cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out when Steven could have gone to the gas station. The gas station is closed after 10pm, so whatever time he went, it had to be before 10pm. Let me list out all the given times when Steven was seen doing other things. First, Steven woke up at 7am. Then, Ashley saw him stretching at a yoga studio from 7am to 10am. So from 7 to 10, he's at yoga. Then William saw him at the library from 1pm to 2pm. After that, Jennifer saw him at the office from 2pm to 3pm. Michael saw him at the theater from 3pm to 7pm. And Mary saw him at the train station from 7pm to 10pm. So let me map out his schedule: - 7am - 10am: Yoga - 10am - 1pm: ? - 1pm - 2pm: Library - 2pm - 3pm: Office - 3pm - 7pm: Theater - 7pm - 10pm: Train station The question is between what times could he have gone to the gas station. The gas station is closed after 10pm, so he must have gone before that. The options are A) 7am-10am, B) 7-10pm, C) 10am-1pm, D) 3pm-7pm. First, check the times when he was doing other things. He was at yoga from 7am to 10am (A), so he can't go to the gas station during that time. Similarly, he was at the library (1-2pm), office (2-3pm), theater (3-7pm), and train station (7-10pm). So those times are all taken. So the only time he's not accounted for is between 10am to 1pm. Let's check that. From 10am to 1pm, there's no mention of him doing anything.
